eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 6:46 PM on JUN 14, 2026 Effective until 9:46 AM JUN 15, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office: the LEVEL 1 BE READY to evacuate CONTINUES for J A C - 427 near 500 block Spencer Gulch road due to the Spencer Gulch Fire.
